matchingRule: Normalized description match against Json/SOR.json using exact, containment, and high token-overlap

items.description: Supply of True colour OVD (Outdoor Video cum TIB Display) of 12 Line, Resolution 432 X 256, Approximate Size 14'X8' as per RDSO Specification RDSO/SPN/TC/108/ 2019, Ver.-0.0 with Amdt. 1.0 or latest. Inspected by RDSO.

Installation of True colour OVD (Outdoor Video Display) , Pixel Resolution 432 X 256 with 12 Line Size 14'X8' (Feet) as per RDSO Specification RDSO/SPN/TC/108 / 2019, Ver.-0.0. Amendt.1 or latest and as per instructions of suite incharge..(All required materials for installation are to be arranged by the contractor) as per Annexure -XVIII.

Supply of HDPE telecom duct with outer diameter of 40mm and inner diameter of 33mm permanently lubricated as per Specn. No. RDSO/SPN/TC/45/2006 Revision 1.0 or latest or as per specification TEC GR No.G/CDS- 08/02,NOV 2004 or latest . HDPE pipe shall be supplied along with 4mm dia polypropylene rope of approved quality inside wherever required. The length of HDPE telecom duct should be 1 KM. End plugs to be provided along with drum (free of cost) (2 No. per Km.).
Earthing and soldering of cable armour.as per instructions of site incharge (Unit Considered : Per Cable)
Supply of HD Base T Twisted Pair Transmitter, 4K UHD HDMI, Bidirectional RS232 & IR Make and Model No.Kramer TP-580 TX or better
Supply of Twisted Pair HDBaseT Receiver, 4K UHD HDMI, Bidirectional RS232, IR Make and Model No.Kramer TP-580 RX or better or equalent from Aten/Extron
Supply & Installation of HDMI Wireless Transmitter /Receiver set Model No. Mars 300 pro or latest with spare batteries of Make: Hollyland or better
Supply & Installation of AV Over IP Encoder, 4K Support Model Number KDS-EN-7 of Kramer make or equalent from Crestron/Black Box/Liberty.

Installation of 16 port Platform Data controller in suitable capacity 9U rack with 8-16 port LIU and rack mountable power sockets.and as per instructions of suite incharge..(All required materials for installation are to be arranged by the contractor)
Comprehensive Annual Maintenance Contract for items enclosed as Annexure-XIX for a period of 5 (Five) Years after completion of Three Years of Warranty Period.

Supply of HDPE telecom duct with outer diameter of 40mm and inner diameter of 33mm permanently lubricated as per Specn. No. RDSO/SPN/TC/45/2006 Revision 1.0 or latest or as per specification TEC GR No.G/CDS- 08/02,NOV 2004 or latest . HDPE pipe shall be supplied along with 4mm dia polypropylene rope of approved quality inside wherever required. The length of HDPE telecom duct should be 1 KM. End plugs to be provided along with drum (free of cost) (2 No. per Km.).

Supply of HDPE duct associated accessories and tools as per the specification of NS.1: (i) Plastic couplers - Slip fit / push type for HDPE duct (2 No. per Km.) ii) End plug for HDPE duct (2 No. per KM). iii) Cable sealing plugs for HDPE duct (1 No. of per Km.)
Laying different type cables in the trench. Termination covered elsewhere.
Laying of HDPE duct 40/33 mm dia in the trenches and in protective works already provided.
Supply of 6F Single mode optical fiber cable Make:Finolex/ Legrand / Systimax / panduit
Supply of Armoured 12 Core Fiber Cable, Make: Finolex or D- Link or BESTNET. Consignee Inspection.
Supply of 12 fiber single mode armoured optical fiber cable- multi loose tube out door direct burial Anti termite Anti rodent UV protected cable Make: R&M/Systimax/panduit
Supply of Multi Cord Binders SIZE 16 mm Make:MX or better (1.5 mts length) and as advised by supervisor in-charge.

Supply and laying/ drawing the 20 Pair PVC switch board cable twisted in pairs PVC sheathed copper conductor 0.5mm dia (Make: Delton/Finolex/ Surabhi) through the PVC casing /PVC pipe (wall mounted/concealed) as specified by supervisor in- charge.

Supply and laying/ drawing the 6 Pair PVC switch board cable twisted in pairs PVC sheathed copper conductor 0.5mm dia (Make: Delton/Finolex/ Surabhi) through the PVC casing /PVC pipe (wall mounted/concealed) as specified by supervisor in- charge.

Supply and laying/ drawing the 10 Pair PVC switch board cable twisted in pairs PVC sheathed copper conductor 0.5mm dia (Make: Delton/Finolex/ Surabhi) through the PVC casing /PVC pipe (wall mounted/concealed) as specified by supervisor in- charge.

Supply of HDPE telecom duct with outer diameter of 40mm and inner diameter of 33mm permanently lubricated as per Specn. No. RDSO/SPN/TC/45/2006 Revision 1.0 or latest or as per specification TEC GR No.G/CDS-08/02,NOV 2004 or latest . HDPE pipe shall be supplied along with 4mm dia polypropylene rope of approved quality inside wherever required. The length of HDPE telecom duct should be 1 KM. End plugs to be provided along with drum (free of cost) (2 No. per Km.).

Excavation of trench to a depth of 1200mm and width of 300m at bottom in all types of soil(Normal soil/soft soil/sandy soil except in hard morum / rocky soils /bridges/ level crossings/ track crossings/ coil pits, ) as per RDSO Sketch no SDO/CABLE LAYING /003 including marking of cable alignment, clearing of jungle, bushes, trial pits if required, refilling with excavated soil, ramming and consolidation after laying of cables complete to the finished item of work as directed by supervisor in- charge.

Excavation of trench to a depth of 1200mm and width of 300m at bottom in hard morum soil as per RDSO Sketch no SDO/CABLE LAYING /003 including marking of cable alignment, clearing of jungle, bushes, trial pits if required, refilling with excavated soil, ramming and consolidation after laying of cables complete to the finished item of work as directed by supervisor in-charge.

Cutting of rock to a depth of 200 mm and width of 200 mm where rock is visible from surface to a depth more than 300 mm up to 550mm, excavation of trench with width 300mm above rock concreting 200mmx200mm after laying of cable with 1 cement: 2 sand : 4 graded stone aggregate 20mm nominal size and curing of concrete to the required number of days, refilling with excavated soil ramming and consolidation except in bridges, culverts, level crossings, track crossings, cable pits, rocky soil including marking of cable alignment, clearing of debris etc., complete to the finished item of work as directed by site in-charge. Drg No.SK/CN/NEW/3. All the material is to be arranged by contractor

Supply of IPM Protection Plug provides both voltage and current protection for single pair on line side. Suitable for Krone modules . Features:•Protection is built in by 3 pole GD Tube• High operating voltage• Nominal current requirement.• Material: Polyvinyl Chloride (PVC).
Supply of FDMS 24F, Fully loaded SC type FDMS with all accessories. Make: Raycham/commscope/ MX/,Bestnet/D-link /Systimax/Legrand.
Supply of 24F joint Enclosures to RDSO spec No RDSO/SPN/ TC/68/ 2014 Rev.1. or latest (to be procured from RDSO approved firm)
Supply of RJ-45 Jacks and Termination with CAT-6 cable Make: D-Link.or similar

Supply of 20 pair cable termination box. make: WAGO: containing part no:280-870(40 nos),280- 374(1nos),249- 116(2nos),210-229/PW11- 0000(1nos) and metallic box for out door use with locking facility(1nos) and Box(1nos).

Supply of 10 pair cable termination box of WAGO make: containing part no:280- 870(20nos),280- 374(1 nos),249- 116(2 nos),210-229/pw11- 0000(1nos) and metallic box for out door use with locking facility(1nos) and Box(1nos).
Supply of VF Transformer assembly (2T) suitable for underground telecom cable circuits 470:600 ohms as per RDSO specs:IRS/TC-76/2021 with Rev.1 or latest. (to be procured from RDSO approved firm)
Supply and installation of 230V AC/12V DC SMPS charger with 10 Amps suitable to 25W VHF set Make:Axiom or better
Supply & installation of Voltage Stabilizer, capacity: 3 KVA, 1 Ph; Input Voltage 140-270V AC; Output voltage 230V (+/-) 10%, with a double pole switch of 32 Amps. Make: Hykon/Servomax or better
